# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3'
services:
  elasticsearch1:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.5.1
    environment:
      - node.name=elasticsearch1
      - cluster.initial_master_nodes=elasticsearch1,elasticsearch2
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
    volumes:
      - data01:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
    ports:
      - 9200:9200
    networks:
      elk_network:
        ipv4_address: 172.31.0.11

  elasticsearch2:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.5.1
    environment:
      - node.name=elasticsearch2
      - cluster.initial_master_nodes=elasticsearch1,elasticsearch2
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
    volumes:
      - data02:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
    ports:
      - 9201:9201
    networks:
      elk_network:
        ipv4_address: 172.31.0.12

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:7.5.1
    volumes:
      - ./config/logstash.yml:/usr/share/logstash/config/logstash.yml
      - ./pipeline:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline
    ports:
      - 5044:5044
    networks:
      elk_network:
        ipv4_address: 172.31.0.13

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.5.1
    ports:
      - 5601:5601
    networks:
      elk_network:
        ipv4<｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>: 172.31.0.14

  apm-server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm/apm-server:7.5.1
    ports:
      - 8200:8200
    networks:
      elk_network:
        ipv4_address: 172.31.0.15

volumes:
  data01:
    driver: local
  data02:
    driver: local

networks:
  elk_network:
    driver: bridge
    ipam:
      config:
        - subnet: 172.31.0.0/16
